title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Large Towels Bath Sheet - Highly Absorbent Egyptian Cotton Towel Set - 4 Pack Extra Soft Large Bath Towel Charcoal-Quick Dry Bath Sheets - 450 GSM Washable Towels, 75X135 Cm
features: WILSFORD BATH SHEETS: Each bathroom towels in this four pack features the simple and elegant Wilsford design- a simple block color bordered by a smooth stripe pattern to bring understated style to your home.
EGYPTIAN COTTON LARGE BATH TOWEL: Super soft large towel feels luxuriously smooth against your skin, ideal for helping you keep warm and dry off in comfort after your cleansing routine.

SUPER ABSORBENT AND QUICK DRY TOWEL: Dry off quickly and efficiently with these stunning luxury towel sets bathroom, expertly designed to soak up moisture in addition to looking fabulous in your home!

EASY CARE MATERIAL: These super soft towel are created from high-quality material, machine washable bath towels, these fabulous bath sheets extra large could be simpler to care for in the convenience of your own home.
As we Evolve, our homes should too. To make your home as comfortable as attractive, please visit the Amazon Official GC GAVENO CAVAILIA store.
